docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY LEVIN, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, RODNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVIN, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, RODNEY $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,695.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVIN, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, RODNEY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.00 SERVED OCT-15-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, RODNEY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $34.70 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF LEVIN, JONATHAN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $528.22 AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, RODNEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
